calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-29-2010 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-02-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Burke Hanson, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Jesse Henry, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Meen Im Yong or Protection Roofing Co.
Default was entered against defendant Protection Roofing Co. on March 23, 2010.
Default was entered against defendant Meen Im Yong on June 21, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on October 25, 2010.
Proof of Service of Statement of Damages was filed on April 8, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Jesse Henry, and against the Defaulted Defendants Meen Im Yong and Protection Roofing Co. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $16,458.00.
Costs - $465.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $16,923.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-26-2010 Continued To Nov-02-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Burke Hansen, Esq. speacial appearance for and with plaintiff Jessie Henry, was placed under oath and examined.

After hearing the tesimony presented, the Court continued the matter to Nov. 2, 2010 at 9:00 am. in Dept. 218.
Plaintiff to submitt proof of service on the statement of damages was file prior to the entry of default.
